questions.question: How many sides does a quadrilateral have?
questions.explanation: A quadrilateral is a polygon with four sides.

questions.question: What is the sum of the interior angles of a quadrilateral?
questions.explanation: The sum of interior angles of a quadrilateral is 360°.

questions.question: Which of the following is a quadrilateral?
questions.explanation: A rectangle has four sides.

questions.question: How many diagonals does a quadrilateral have?
questions.explanation: A quadrilateral has two diagonals.

questions.question: Which quadrilateral has opposite sides equal and parallel?
questions.explanation: In a parallelogram, opposite sides are equal and parallel.

questions.question: Which quadrilateral has all sides equal?
questions.explanation: All sides of a rhombus are equal.

questions.question: Which quadrilateral has all angles equal to 90°?
questions.explanation: Both squares and rectangles have four right angles.

questions.question: Which quadrilateral has exactly one pair of parallel sides?
questions.explanation: A trapezium has one pair of parallel sides.

questions.question: In a parallelogram, opposite angles are:
questions.explanation: Opposite angles of a parallelogram are equal.

questions.question: In a parallelogram, opposite sides are:
questions.explanation: Opposite sides of a parallelogram are equal.

questions.question: Which quadrilateral has diagonals that bisect each other?
questions.explanation: In a parallelogram, diagonals bisect each other.

questions.question: Which quadrilateral has diagonals that are equal?
questions.explanation: Diagonals of a rectangle are equal.

questions.question: Which quadrilateral has diagonals perpendicular to each other?
questions.explanation: Diagonals of a rhombus are perpendicular.

questions.question: A square is a special type of:
questions.explanation: A square satisfies properties of a parallelogram.

questions.question: Which quadrilateral has opposite sides parallel?
questions.explanation: Opposite sides are parallel in a parallelogram.

questions.question: Which quadrilateral has all sides equal and all angles 90°?
questions.explanation: A square has equal sides and right angles.

questions.question: Which quadrilateral has diagonals that bisect at right angles?
questions.explanation: Diagonals of a rhombus bisect each other at right angles.

questions.question: Which quadrilateral has only one pair of parallel sides?
questions.explanation: Trapezium has one pair of parallel sides.

questions.question: A rectangle is a type of:
questions.explanation: A rectangle has opposite sides parallel like a parallelogram.

questions.question: Which quadrilateral has diagonals that are equal and bisect each other?
questions.explanation: Diagonals of a rectangle are equal and bisect each other.

questions.question: Which quadrilateral has two pairs of adjacent equal sides?
questions.explanation: A kite has two pairs of adjacent equal sides.

questions.question: The diagonals of a square are:
questions.explanation: All these properties hold for a square.

questions.question: How many vertices does a quadrilateral have?
questions.explanation: A quadrilateral has four vertices.

questions.question: Which quadrilateral always has right angles?
questions.explanation: A rectangle has four right angles.

questions.question: Which quadrilateral has opposite sides parallel and equal?
questions.explanation: This is a defining property of parallelogram.
